name: construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We convert purchase orders into vendor payment schedules instead of manual tracking of payment schedules.
problem_solved: Delayed payments leading to cash flow gaps.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Delayed payments leading to cash flow gaps.
